SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class ServerController

java.lang.Object
ocsf.server.AbstractServer
server.controller.ServerController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class ServerController extends AbstractServer
The main controller for the server-side application. Extends the OCSF AbstractServer to handle network communication. Manages background threads, client connections, and delegates requests to the Router.

  • Constructor Details

    • ServerController

      public ServerController(int port, ServerViewController view)
      Constructs the ServerController, initializes background threads, and starts the server.
      Parameters:
      port - The port number to listen on.
      view - The GUI controller for logging and displaying connected clients.

  • Method Details

    • clientConnected

      protected void clientConnected(ConnectionToClient client)
      Called when a client connects to the server. Logs the connection and updates the GUI table via ServerViewController.
      Overrides:
      clientConnected in class AbstractServer
      Parameters:
      client - The connection to the client.

    • clientDisconnected

      protected void clientDisconnected(ConnectionToClient client)
      Called when a client disconnects from the server. Logs the disconnection, updates the GUI table, and removes the client from the router.
      Overrides:
      clientDisconnected in class AbstractServer
      Parameters:
      client - The connection to the client.

    • clientException

      protected void clientException(ConnectionToClient client, Throwable exception)
      Called when an exception occurs on the client's connection. Ensures the client is removed from the list properly.
      Overrides:
      clientException in class AbstractServer
      Parameters:
      client - The connection to the client.
      exception - The exception that occurred.

    • serverClosed

      public void serverClosed()
      Cleans the DB connections and stops threads before closing the server application. Sends a quit message to all connected clients.
      Overrides:
      serverClosed in class AbstractServer

    • handleMessageFromClient

      public void handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
      Receives an Object/Request from the client and delegates it to the router. Handles the "quit" message and ensures the message is of type Request.
      Specified by:
      handleMessageFromClient in class AbstractServer
      Parameters:
      msg - The message received from the client.
      client - The connection to the client.
